feat: mode-specific cross-exam, consensus detection, categorized items, help guide, --branch diff

  severity breakdown, and source distribution.

  Architecture & Design, Performance & Scaling, Testing & Quality,
  Operations & Deployment, Developer Experience, Data Integrity headers
  while preserving sequential numbering for cherry-picking.

  sentence guidance covering codebase context, model relevance, and a
  unique recommendation.

- Mode selection guide: help output now includes "Choosing a Mode"
  section with decision heuristics.

- --branch flag for diff mode: supports staged (default), --branch (vs
  main), and --branch <name> (vs specified branch) comparisons.

commit.message:
Add /api/dashboard/trades endpoint, fix equity curve mixing execution modes

The equity curve, drawdown, and performance chart were pulling ALL
closed trades regardless of execution_mode, mixing 18 legacy
agentic_full trades with 4 quant_only trades. This caused the Overview
to show 22 trades at 50% WR while Performance showed 4 at 75%.

- Add get_trades_list() for individual trade history with full details
- Add GET /api/dashboard/trades endpoint (mode, days, include_open)
- Pass execution_mode through equity curve and drawdown functions
- All chart endpoints now default to quant_only filter

Fixed sessionsElapsed going negative after experiment reset — after startExperiment
resets adaptive_stats, the formula was subtracting the old baseline count instead of
using the new count directly. Added array validation guard in appendWeightSnapshot
to recover from corrupted metadata. Added test for sessionsElapsed correctness.

commit.message:
fix: remove tryOpenIncludePreview that opened wrong content for !include diagrams

Clicking a diagram with !include/!includesub in markdown preview was
intercepting the click and opening the entire include file in puml-preview
instead of showing the rendered diagram in the diagram viewer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(e2e): fix finding visibility race condition in review E2E specs

Root cause: store populates async via useEffect, but accordion visibility
check ran immediately after finding-list wrapper appeared (always visible).
When all findings are minor, the accordion check was skipped (findings not
loaded yet), leaving finding-compact-row elements hidden in collapsed accordion.

Fix: new waitForFindingsVisible() helper that waits for finding-count-summary
to show non-zero Total (confirming store populated) before checking accordion.
Also bumps parity-comparison URL assertion timeout from 5s to 15s for CI.

Pre-existing failures fixed:
- review-findings.spec.ts:127 (P0 findings not visible)
- review-l3-findings.spec.ts:296 (total count not visible)
- review-l3-findings.spec.ts:211 (L3 findings not visible)
- parity-comparison.spec.ts:100 (URL timeout too short)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

since EasyPanel uses the repo root as build context.

- Changes feed: /changes/ page with 60-day launch timeline, filter buttons (All/Launches/Pricing/Capabilities), and mid-feed newsletter signup.

593 pages built, 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove cut & deal feature; polish shuffle panel UI

The "cut & deal" option had a bug where the cut card from a previous
round would reappear on redeal (after everyone passes). The feature
wasn't worth keeping, so it has been fully removed from client and
server.

UI improvements:
- Shuffle option buttons and the Deal button are noticeably larger
- Shuffling panel header changed to "Choose your Shuffles"

Changes across 11 files (-193 / +46 lines net):
- ShufflingPanel.jsx: removed Cut & Deal button; simplified handleDeal
- wsEmitters.js: WsDeal() no longer accepts a dealType argument
- wsGameListeners.js: removed game-cut-card socket listener & handler
- game.js (Redux slice): removed cutCard state field & setCutCard action
- DealingOverlay.jsx: removed cutCard prop, showCutCard state, reveal
  useEffect, and entire cut-card-reveal JSX block
- GameBoard.jsx: removed cutCard prop passed to DealingOverlay
- dealCardsHandler.js: always deals without cut; removed cutCard emit
  to dealer socket; totalDelay no longer includes CUT_CARD_REVEAL_MS
- startGame.js / autoNextGame.js: removed cutCardRevealMs from
  dealingConfig
- _dealing.scss: removed .cut-card-reveal block and fadeInScale keyframes
- _shuffling.scss: larger shuffle-btn (18px 28px, min-width 104px) and
  deal-btn (16px 48px); removed unused .deal-cut ruleset

commit.message:
fix: streak/points bugs — no false -2 penalty, no recovery from zero, recalculate past days

- Don't apply -2 "no tasks" penalty in live points when day just started
- Streak stays at 0 instead of entering recovery when no streak exists yet
- Cron accepts optional date param to recalculate past days' summaries
- Admin panel gets "Recalculate Yesterday" button to recover missed points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Three Tunes figures, EndFacing enum, and new moves

Add arches (tops left/right), thread the needle (tops/sides),
hook and chain with turnCorner and pullByCorner moves. Introduce
EndFacing enum for granular rotation control on chain, partner,
corner, and house moves. Pre-compute chain timelines to eliminate
inter-step pauses. Fix lead around to orbit actual formation center.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: improve diagnostics, output reliability, and risk docs for peer-review

Cherry-picked from a self-review (/peer-review on SKILL.md itself):

1. Stderr capture: Replace 2>/dev/null with temp file capture so CLI
   failures (auth errors, rate limits) show diagnostic output instead
   of silent "exit code 1" messages.

2. Version/auth preflight: Add --version smoke checks after command -v
   to catch OAuth/auth issues before parallel dispatch hangs.

3. Numbered output: Append "Number each finding sequentially" to all
   20 multi-round mode prompts (10 modes x 2 models) so the cherry-pick
   UX ("keep 1, 3, 5") works reliably.

4. Accepted Risks: Document the argv prompt exposure limitation with
   mitigations and future fix path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Upgrade next to 14.2.35 to fix security vulnerability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: block crawlers from filtered/paginated directory URLs

DDG and other crawlers were hitting /pain-management/*/? with filter
params (specialty, page, etc.) at 23 req/sec, each bypassing ISR cache
and triggering fresh DB queries. Now returns 404 for any crawler
hitting directory pages with query parameters. Clean canonical URLs
remain crawlable for indexing.
